feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Weather Update: Madhya Pradesh के 16 और Bihar के 11 जिलों में भारी बारिश का अलर्ट वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Weather Update: Madhya Pradesh के 16 और Bihar के 11 जिलों में भारी बारिश का अलर्ट वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Indian Meteorological Department has released Orange Alert regarding the rain in the capital Delhi-NCR, the department has expressed the possibility of heavy rain once again today in Noida, Greater Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurugram, Faridabad and Palwal along with Delhi. Let the period of heavy rain continue in these areas from tomorrow, due to which people have got relief from the heat, the sky is still cloudy and heavy rain is expected during the next few hours.
लगातार हो रही बारिश से बिहार असम समेत देश के कई हिस्से बाढ़ की चपेट में है. वहीं कई जगह बारिश से जनजवीन प्रभावित हो गया है. इस बीच भारतीय मौसम विभाग ने देश के कई राज्यों में बारिश को लेकर अलर्ट जारी किया है. मौसम विभाग ने दिल्ली एनसीआर में गुरुवार को तेज बारिश की आशंका जताई है. दिल्ली, नोएडा, ग्रेटर नोएडा, गुरुग्राम, फरीदाबाद, पलवल में भारी बारिश हो सकती है. बता दें कि दिल्ली एनसीआर में बुधवार को कहीं तेज कहीं हल्की बारिश हुई. जिससे लोगों को गर्मी से राहत मिली है.
#WeatherAlert #IMD #MonsoonUpdate
entry.summary: The Indian Meteorological Department has released Orange Alert regarding the rain in the capital Delhi-NCR, the department has expressed the possibility of heavy rain once again today in Noida, Greater Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurugram, Faridabad and Palwal along with Delhi. Let the period of heavy rain continue in these areas from tomorrow, due to which people have got relief from the heat, the sky is still cloudy and heavy rain is expected during the next few hours. लगातार हो रही बारिश से बिहार असम समेत देश के कई हिस्से बाढ़ की चपेट में है. वहीं कई जगह बारिश से जनजवीन प्रभावित हो गया है. इस बीच भारतीय मौसम विभाग ने देश के कई राज्यों में बारिश को लेकर अलर्ट जारी किया है. मौसम विभाग ने दिल्ली एनसीआर में गुरुवार को तेज बारिश की आशंका जताई है. दिल्ली, नोएडा, ग्रेटर नोएडा, गुरुग्राम, फरीदाबाद, पलवल में भारी बारिश हो सकती है. बता दें कि दिल्ली एनसीआर में बुधवार को कहीं तेज कहीं हल्की बारिश हुई. जिससे लोगों को गर्मी से राहत मिली है. #WeatherAlert #IMD #MonsoonUpdate

entry.title: Amerika Dihajar Topan Hanna!

link.title: Amerika Dihajar Topan Hanna!

entry.content: VIVA – Badai itu sampai daratan Texas pada Sabtu waktu setempat, 25 Juli 2020, sekitar pukul 6 sore. Hanna masuk dalam badai kategori 1 namun berpotensi membawa banjir dan angin kencang. Menurut National Hurricane Center, Topan Hanna menghasilkan angin sekencang 144 km per jam. Hanna adalah topan Atlantik pertama di tahun 2020. #Hanna #Topan
entry.summary: VIVA – Badai itu sampai daratan Texas pada Sabtu waktu setempat, 25 Juli 2020, sekitar pukul 6 sore. Hanna masuk dalam badai kategori 1 namun berpotensi membawa banjir dan angin kencang. Menurut National Hurricane Center, Topan Hanna menghasilkan angin sekencang 144 km per jam. Hanna adalah topan Atlantik pertama di tahun 2020. #Hanna #Topan

entry.title: Uchida Maaya flirts on a Zoom blind date

link.title: Uchida Maaya flirts on a Zoom blind date

entry.content:
TL Note:
Summer Sonic is an annual rock music festival in Japan.
Tetsuko’s Room is a famous talk show in Japan.
Zawachin is known for looking like celebrities by doing imitation make-up on the upper half of her face.
More actress Maaya! ♥
This is a really fun show which uncovers the different tactics “coy” girls use when flirting. I’m also a fan of Chiba Yudai’s acting, so it was cool seeing this kind of interaction.
Also wow I didn’t realise how time consuming these variety shows are to sub because they talk over each other and it’s just a rainbow vomit of captions. I hope that you guys don’t have a stroke trying to read all the colour coded subs.
Look forward to long haired Maaya in the next vid!
People featured:
Uchida Maaya 内田真礼
Yamasato Ryota 山里亮太
Tanaka Minami 田中みな実
Hironaka Ayaka 弘中綾香
Chiba Yudai 千葉雄大
Nakamura Yurika 中村ゆりか
Outro:
Saitou Shuka - Papapa
斉藤朱夏「パパパ」
Source:
あざとくて何が悪いの？ 2020.07.25
What’s wrong with “AZATOI”? / What’s wrong with being coy? 2020.07.25
(´｡• ᵕ •｡`) Buy me a coffee here:
My Twitter where all I do is Retweet:
entry.summary: TL Note: Summer Sonic is an annual rock music festival in Japan. Tetsuko’s Room is a famous talk show in Japan. Zawachin is known for looking like celebrities by doing imitation make-up on the upper half of her face. More actress Maaya! ♥ This is a really fun show which uncovers the different tactics “coy” girls use when flirting. I’m also a fan of Chiba Yudai’s acting, so it was cool seeing this kind of interaction. Also wow I didn’t realise how time consuming these variety shows are to sub because they talk over each other and it’s just a rainbow vomit of captions. I hope that you guys don’t have a stroke trying to read all the colour coded subs. Look forward to long haired Maaya in the next vid! People featured: Uchida Maaya 内田真礼 Yamasato Ryota 山里亮太 Tanaka Minami 田中みな実 Hironaka Ayaka 弘中綾香 Chiba Yudai 千葉雄大 Nakamura Yurika 中村ゆりか Outro: Saitou Shuka - Papapa 斉藤朱夏「パパパ」 Source: あざとくて何が悪いの？ 2020.07.25 What’s wrong with “AZATOI”? / What’s wrong with being coy? 2020.07.25 (´｡• ᵕ •｡`) Buy me a coffee here: My Twitter where all I do is Retweet:

entry.title: Capitulo 5 - 1ª Parte❤️¡¡ESPAÑOL SUPER CALIDAD HD!! Señor Equivocado (Bay Yanlis)❤️24-07-2020 Can Yaman

link.title: Capitulo 5 - 1ª Parte❤️¡¡ESPAÑOL SUPER CALIDAD HD!! Señor Equivocado (Bay Yanlis)❤️24-07-2020 Can Yaman

entry.content:
2ª PARTE, Capítulo 5 ¡¡ESPAÑOL SUPER HD!! VER AQUÍ ❤️
3ª PARTE, Capítulo 5 ¡¡ESPAÑOL SUPER HD!! VER AQUÍ ❤️
CAPÍTULOS, VIERNES TRAS SU EMISIÓN!❤️
Sr. Incorrecto (Bay Yanlış) Capítulo 5 (Viernes 24 de Julio) Özgür (Can Yaman); El dueño de un restaurante pero bar que vive una vida rica pero en mal estado y no cree en el Amor.
Ezgi (Özge Gürel); ahora está cansado de las relaciones incorrectas, tiene una relación adecuada y está decidido a casarse. Al ver que Ezgi no tiene éxito en asuntos de relaciones, Özgür comienza a orientarla sobre las relaciones y le da tácticas para que Ezgi obtenga al hombre que le gusta. ¿Qué vivirán Özgür y Ezgi en las casas vecinas con el tiempo? Elenco: Can Yaman Özge Gürel Fatma Toptaş Gürgen Öz Cemre Gümeli Serkay Tütüncü. Sígueme para más contenido❤️
#FOX #CanYaman #SeñorEquivocado #BayYanlis #MrWrong #Mr.Wrong #OzgeGurel #ÖzgeGürel
entry.summary: 2ª PARTE, Capítulo 5 ¡¡ESPAÑOL SUPER HD!! VER AQUÍ ❤️ 3ª PARTE, Capítulo 5 ¡¡ESPAÑOL SUPER HD!! VER AQUÍ ❤️ CAPÍTULOS, VIERNES TRAS SU EMISIÓN!❤️ Sr. Incorrecto (Bay Yanlış) Capítulo 5 (Viernes 24 de Julio) Özgür (Can Yaman); El dueño de un restaurante pero bar que vive una vida rica pero en mal estado y no cree en el Amor. Ezgi (Özge Gürel); ahora está cansado de las relaciones incorrectas, tiene una relación adecuada y está decidido a casarse. Al ver que Ezgi no tiene éxito en asuntos de relaciones, Özgür comienza a orientarla sobre las relaciones y le da tácticas para que Ezgi obtenga al hombre que le gusta. ¿Qué vivirán Özgür y Ezgi en las casas vecinas con el tiempo? Elenco: Can Yaman Özge Gürel Fatma Toptaş Gürgen Öz Cemre Gümeli Serkay Tütüncü. Sígueme para más contenido❤️ #FOX #CanYaman #SeñorEquivocado #BayYanlis #MrWrong #Mr.Wrong #OzgeGurel #ÖzgeGürel

link.title: See a War-Torn Philippines in These World War II Clips

entry.content:
World War II happened nearly a century ago. These black-and-white clips are a rare peek into those tragic years.
Follow us:

entry.title: #RaaviKondalaRao : సీనియ‌ర్ న‌టుడు రావి కొండ‌ల‌రావు క‌న్నుమూత‌ ! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: #RaaviKondalaRao : సీనియ‌ర్ న‌టుడు రావి కొండ‌ల‌రావు క‌న్నుమూత‌ ! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
ప్రముఖ నటుడు, రచయిత, దర్శకుడు , సినీ జర్నలిస్టు, రావి కొండలరావు ఇకలేరు. కొద్దికాలంగా వృద్దాప్య సంబంధిత వ్యాధులతో బాధపడుతున్న ఆయన మంగళవారం గుండెపోటుతో మరణించారు. బేగంపేట హాస్పిటల్ లో ఆయన తుది శ్వాస విడిచారు . ఆయన మృతితో తెలుగు, తమిళ సినీ పరిశ్రమ తీవ్ర దిగ్బ్రాంతికి గురైంది. ఆయన మృతికి పలువురు సంతాపం వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు.
#RaaviKondalaRao
#RIPRaaviKondalaRao
#RaaviKondalaRaoNoMore
#VeternTeluguActor
#Tollywood
entry.summary: ప్రముఖ నటుడు, రచయిత, దర్శకుడు , సినీ జర్నలిస్టు, రావి కొండలరావు ఇకలేరు. కొద్దికాలంగా వృద్దాప్య సంబంధిత వ్యాధులతో బాధపడుతున్న ఆయన మంగళవారం గుండెపోటుతో మరణించారు. బేగంపేట హాస్పిటల్ లో ఆయన తుది శ్వాస విడిచారు . ఆయన మృతితో తెలుగు, తమిళ సినీ పరిశ్రమ తీవ్ర దిగ్బ్రాంతికి గురైంది. ఆయన మృతికి పలువురు సంతాపం వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. #RaaviKondalaRao #RIPRaaviKondalaRao #RaaviKondalaRaoNoMore #VeternTeluguActor #Tollywood

entry.title: Deewangi Episode 37

link.title: Deewangi Episode 37

entry.content:
Deewangi - Episode 37   English Subtitles   15th July 2020 - HAR PAL GEO
Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas
Living with her cruel brother-in-law, ambitious Nageen Faiyaz works several menial jobs to break free from the shackles of poverty and dependence.
Working as a bus hostess, she meets Sultan Durrani; soon-to -be politician with great influence. Drawn by her presence, Sultan falls for Nageen, at first sight. Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh.
Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace?
entry.summary: Deewangi - Episode 37 English Subtitles 15th July 2020 - HAR PAL GEO Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas Living with her cruel brother-in-law, ambitious Nageen Faiyaz works several menial jobs to break free from the shackles of poverty and dependence. Working as a bus hostess, she meets Sultan Durrani; soon-to -be politician with great influence. Drawn by her presence, Sultan falls for Nageen, at first sight. Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh. Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace?

entry.title: Mobil Hancur Tertimpa Longsor

link.title: Mobil Hancur Tertimpa Longsor

entry.content:
SEMARANG, KOMPAS.TV - Tanah longsor terjadi di RT 1 RW 4 Jalan Stonen Selatan, Kelurahan Bendan Ngisor, Kecamatan Gajahmungkur, Kota Semarang, pada Senin (20/7/2020) siang. Dalam kejadian tersebut, satu unit mobil pick up ringsek tertimpa bongkahan batu yang berasal dari material longsor.
Menurut pemilik mobil pick up grand max bernomor polisi H 1758 TG yang ringsek tertimpa bongkahan batu, kejadian tanah longsor terjadi sekitar pukul 12 .00 WIB. Sekitar lima menit sebelum kejadian, dirinya tiba di lokasi kejadian dan parkir untuk masuk ke tempat percetakan di depan lokasi.
Tidak berselang lama, terjadi tanah longsor dan langsung menimpa mobil pick up miliknya.
Ketinggian tebing yang longsor milik Akademi Sekretari Marsudirini Santa Maria Kota Semarang ini sekitar 20 hingga 25 meter. Beruntung tidak ada korban jiwa akibat kejadian ini. Namun kerugian diperkirakan mencapai 145 juta rupiah.
#TanahLongsor #TebingLongsor #KotaSemarang
entry.summary: SEMARANG, KOMPAS.TV - Tanah longsor terjadi di RT 1 RW 4 Jalan Stonen Selatan, Kelurahan Bendan Ngisor, Kecamatan Gajahmungkur, Kota Semarang, pada Senin (20/7/2020) siang. Dalam kejadian tersebut, satu unit mobil pick up ringsek tertimpa bongkahan batu yang berasal dari material longsor. Menurut pemilik mobil pick up grand max bernomor polisi H 1758 TG yang ringsek tertimpa bongkahan batu, kejadian tanah longsor terjadi sekitar pukul 12 .00 WIB. Sekitar lima menit sebelum kejadian, dirinya tiba di lokasi kejadian dan parkir untuk masuk ke tempat percetakan di depan lokasi. Tidak berselang lama, terjadi tanah longsor dan langsung menimpa mobil pick up miliknya. Ketinggian tebing yang longsor milik Akademi Sekretari Marsudirini Santa Maria Kota Semarang ini sekitar 20 hingga 25 meter. Beruntung tidak ada korban jiwa akibat kejadian ini. Namun kerugian diperkirakan mencapai 145 juta rupiah. #TanahLongsor #TebingLongsor #KotaSemarang

entry.title: Rafale in India : Shikhar Dhawan-Tiwary tweets after Rafale arrives in Ambala base वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Rafale in India : Shikhar Dhawan-Tiwary tweets after Rafale arrives in Ambala base वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Nearly 23 years after Sukhoi aircraft were imported, a fleet of five French-manufactured Rafale multi-role combat jets touched down in India. The fighter jets earlier entered the Indian airspace at about 1.30 pm and were greeted by an Indian Navy warship, INS Kolkata, deployed in the western Arabian Sea. The NDA government had inked a Rs 59,000-crore deal on September 23, 2016 to procure 36 Rafale jets from French aerospace major Dassault Aviation after a nearly seven-year exercise to procure 126 Medium MMRCA for the Indian Air Force did not fructify during the UPA regime.
29 अगस्त भारत के लिहाज से ऐतिहासिक दिन है. आखिरकार फ्रांस से राफेल को लाया गया. इंडियन एयरफोर्स के लिए तैयार फ्रेंच फाइटर जेट राफेल की लैंडिंग आज अंबाला आ गई है. पांच राफेल का पहला बैच आज भारत पहुंच गया है. अंबाला एयरबेस पर एयरफोर्स चीफ आरकेएस भदौरिया ने राफेल के पहले बैच को रिसीव किया. राफेल के भारत आगमन के साथ ही सोशल मीडिया पर लोगों ने उन्हें सलाम किया. इसमें भारतीय क्रिकेटर भी पीछे नहीं रहे. भारतीय ओपनर शिखर धवन ने राफेल का स्वागत करते हुए ट्वीट किया. उन्होंने लिखा, ‘घर में स्वागत है गोल्डन एरोज. हमारे देश के लिए अद्भुत क्षण.’ शिखर धवन ने राफेल के आगमन को देश के लिए अद्भुत मौका बताया
#Rafale #ShikharDhawan #ManojTiwary
entry.summary: Nearly 23 years after Sukhoi aircraft were imported, a fleet of five French-manufactured Rafale multi-role combat jets touched down in India. The fighter jets earlier entered the Indian airspace at about 1.30 pm and were greeted by an Indian Navy warship, INS Kolkata, deployed in the western Arabian Sea. The NDA government had inked a Rs 59,000-crore deal on September 23, 2016 to procure 36 Rafale jets from French aerospace major Dassault Aviation after a nearly seven-year exercise to procure 126 Medium MMRCA for the Indian Air Force did not fructify during the UPA regime. 29 अगस्त भारत के लिहाज से ऐतिहासिक दिन है. आखिरकार फ्रांस से राफेल को लाया गया. इंडियन एयरफोर्स के लिए तैयार फ्रेंच फाइटर जेट राफेल की लैंडिंग आज अंबाला आ गई है. पांच राफेल का पहला बैच आज भारत पहुंच गया है. अंबाला एयरबेस पर एयरफोर्स चीफ आरकेएस भदौरिया ने राफेल के पहले बैच को रिसीव किया. राफेल के भारत आगमन के साथ ही सोशल मीडिया पर लोगों ने उन्हें सलाम किया. इसमें भारतीय क्रिकेटर भी पीछे नहीं रहे. भारतीय ओपनर शिखर धवन ने राफेल का स्वागत करते हुए ट्वीट किया. उन्होंने लिखा, ‘घर में स्वागत है गोल्डन एरोज. हमारे देश के लिए अद्भुत क्षण.’ शिखर धवन ने राफेल के आगमन को देश के लिए अद्भुत मौका बताया #Rafale #ShikharDhawan #ManojTiwary

entry.title: Tourisme : inquiétude des guides-conférenciers face à la crise

link.title: Tourisme : inquiétude des guides-conférenciers face à la crise

entry.content:
Les guides conférenciers se disent les grands oubliés des mesures d’urgence. Pour ceux qui ne sont pas salariés, et il y en a beaucoup, sans touriste, c’est zéro visite et zéro revenu.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Les guides conférenciers se disent les grands oubliés des mesures d’urgence. Pour ceux qui ne sont pas salariés, et il y en a beaucoup, sans touriste, c’est zéro visite et zéro revenu. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: 100 Years of Baby Fashion

link.title: 100 Years of Baby Fashion

entry.content:
Take a look back at the last century of the most popular clothes in baby fashion.
100 Years of Baby Fashion
100 Years of Baby Fashion
100 Years of Baby Fashion
entry.summary: Take a look back at the last century of the most popular clothes in baby fashion.100 Years of Baby Fashion 100 Years of Baby Fashion 100 Years of Baby Fashion

entry.title: #AskNASA┃ How Do You Build a Mars Rover?

link.title: #AskNASA┃ How Do You Build a Mars Rover?

entry.content:
How will Perseverance help with future human exploration? And how will the Mars Ingenuity Helicopter work?
NASA’s Mars 2020 Perseverance rover is creating a lot of excitement. The new rover will look for signs of past microbial life, cache rock and soil samples, and prepare for future human exploration.
As part of the assembly, test, and launch operations team, NASA engineer Michelle Colizzi explains the Perseverance rover’s mission. She details how the drill will collect core samples and outlines plans to test a new technology to produce oxygen from the Martian atmosphere.
For more information about the mission, go to: mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
entry.summary: How will Perseverance help with future human exploration? And how will the Mars Ingenuity Helicopter work? NASA’s Mars 2020 Perseverance rover is creating a lot of excitement. The new rover will look for signs of past microbial life, cache rock and soil samples, and prepare for future human exploration. As part of the assembly, test, and launch operations team, NASA engineer Michelle Colizzi explains the Perseverance rover’s mission. She details how the drill will collect core samples and outlines plans to test a new technology to produce oxygen from the Martian atmosphere. For more information about the mission, go to: mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/

entry.title: Hôtel Transylvanie 3 : des vacances monstrueuses (2018) - Bande annonce

link.title: Hôtel Transylvanie 3 : des vacances monstrueuses (2018) - Bande annonce

entry.content:
Film - Film d’animation réalisé par Genndy Tartakovsky.
Avec .
Sortie en 2018
Synopsis :
Notre famille de monstres préférée embarque pour une croisière de rêve afin que Drac puisse enfin souffler un peu et savourer des vacances au lieu de s’occuper de tout le monde à l’hôtel. Tout s’annonce à merveille pour la petite famille, entre matchs de volley monstres, excursions exotiques et séances de bronzette au clair de lune… Mais les vacances idéales prennent un tour inattendu lorsque Mavis se rend compte que Drac est tombé sous le charme de la mystérieuse Ericka, la capitaine humaine du navire, dont le secret les menace tous…
En savoir plus :
L’actualité du cinéma :
Les films de la semaine :
Retrouvez Télérama sur :
Facebook :
Instagram :
Twitter :
Youtube :
entry.summary: Film - Film d’animation réalisé par Genndy Tartakovsky. Avec . Sortie en 2018 Synopsis : Notre famille de monstres préférée embarque pour une croisière de rêve afin que Drac puisse enfin souffler un peu et savourer des vacances au lieu de s’occuper de tout le monde à l’hôtel. Tout s’annonce à merveille pour la petite famille, entre matchs de volley monstres, excursions exotiques et séances de bronzette au clair de lune… Mais les vacances idéales prennent un tour inattendu lorsque Mavis se rend compte que Drac est tombé sous le charme de la mystérieuse Ericka, la capitaine humaine du navire, dont le secret les menace tous… En savoir plus : L’actualité du cinéma : Les films de la semaine : Retrouvez Télérama sur : Facebook : Instagram : Twitter : Youtube :

entry.title: Critiqués sur leur habillement: Cheikh et Khadim Peuzzi réagissent fortement ‘Abba Motakh Ba’

link.title: Critiqués sur leur habillement: Cheikh et Khadim Peuzzi réagissent fortement ‘Abba Motakh Ba’

entry.content: Dans l’interview que nous avons eu avec les phénomènes Cheikh et Khadim Peuzzi, nos invités n’ont pas manqué de réagir sur les critiques portées par les internautes. Selon les jeunes, ils ne font que suivre la tendance du moment et etre en phase avec le mise de l’été.
entry.summary: Dans l’interview que nous avons eu avec les phénomènes Cheikh et Khadim Peuzzi, nos invités n’ont pas manqué de réagir sur les critiques portées par les internautes. Selon les jeunes, ils ne font que suivre la tendance du moment et etre en phase avec le mise de l’été.

entry.title: ICC Postponed 2023 World Cup In India On PCB’s Request Oneindia Malayalam

link.title: ICC Postponed 2023 World Cup In India On PCB’s Request Oneindia Malayalam

entry.content:
ICC Postponed 2023 World Cup In India On PCB’s Request
ഇന്ത്യയില്‍ നടക്കാനിരുന്ന 2023ലെ ലോകകപ്പിന്റെ തിയ്യതിയിലും ഐസിസി മാറ്റം വരുത്തിയിരുന്നു. ഇതിനു പിന്നില്‍ പാകിസ്താന്‍ ക്രിക്കറ്റ് ബോര്‍ഡ് മേധാവി എഹസാന്‍ മാനിയാണന്ന സൂചനകളാണ് പുറത്തു വരുന്നത്.
entry.summary: ICC Postponed 2023 World Cup In India On PCB’s Request ഇന്ത്യയില്‍ നടക്കാനിരുന്ന 2023ലെ ലോകകപ്പിന്റെ തിയ്യതിയിലും ഐസിസി മാറ്റം വരുത്തിയിരുന്നു. ഇതിനു പിന്നില്‍ പാകിസ്താന്‍ ക്രിക്കറ്റ് ബോര്‍ഡ് മേധാവി എഹസാന്‍ മാനിയാണന്ന സൂചനകളാണ് പുറത്തു വരുന്നത്.

entry.title: 2020 CUPRA Ateca - Product

link.title: 2020 CUPRA Ateca - Product

entry.content:
The new CUPRA Ateca 2020 aims to deliver the ultimate dynamic performance and maintain the brand’s spirit but brings additional levels of desirability to help it meet the requirements of an ever more demanding market.
The CUPRA Ateca was the first vehicle to be launched under the stand-alone high-performance brand and offered a unique proposition in the market, bringing the highest performance of any SUV outside of the premium manufacturers. The CUPRA Ateca is a vehicle that offers a mixture of precision, sportiness, practicality and alluring design. And now those characteristics have been enhanced to make it an even greater proposition.
entry.summary: The new CUPRA Ateca 2020 aims to deliver the ultimate dynamic performance and maintain the brand’s spirit but brings additional levels of desirability to help it meet the requirements of an ever more demanding market. The CUPRA Ateca was the first vehicle to be launched under the stand-alone high-performance brand and offered a unique proposition in the market, bringing the highest performance of any SUV outside of the premium manufacturers. The CUPRA Ateca is a vehicle that offers a mixture of precision, sportiness, practicality and alluring design. And now those characteristics have been enhanced to make it an even greater proposition.

entry.title: Erbakan’dan müthiş sözler: Eğer Ayasofya açılmışsa…

link.title: Erbakan’dan müthiş sözler: Eğer Ayasofya açılmışsa…

entry.content:
Milli Görüş’ün merhum lideri Prof. Dr. Necmettin Erbakan’ın Ayasofya Camii’nin açılışının önemini anlatan bir konuşması yeniden gündeme geldi.
Erbakan Hoca yaptığı konuşmada, "Eğer Ayasofya’da gümbür gümbür Ezanlar okunuyor, Hakk’ın sesi bütün dünyaya ilan ediliyorsa, o zaman da biliniz ki; Türkiye’de Milli Görüşçüler hakimdir, inananlar hakimdir" ifadeleri dikkat çekti.
İşte Erbakan’ın o konuşması: 
"Eğer Ayasofya kırmızıya boyanmışsa… Kiliseye benzetilmişse… Ezan okunmuyor, içinde namaz kılınmıyorsa… Biliniz ki; Türkiye’yi taklitçiler hakimdir! Biliniz ki; yeryüzünde sadece zulüm düzeni yürümektedir. Yok, eğer Ayasofya’da gümbür gümbür Ezanlar okunuyor, Hakk’ın sesi bütün dünyaya ilan ediliyorsa, o zaman da biliniz ki; Türkiye’de Milli Görüşçüler hakimdir, inananlar hakimdir, yeryüzünde adil düzen saadet nizamı hakimdir!"
{relation id:1341955 slug:’ihsan-senocak-acikladi-hz-ebu-eyyub-el-ensarinin-ayasofya-kerameti-bugun-ortaya-cikti’}
{relation id:1341767 slug:’ayasofya-camiindeki-cuma-namazi-uzaydan-goruntulendi’}
{relation id:1335160 slug:’erdogan-ve-erbakandan-surpriz-gorusme-cumhurbaskanimiz-ile-bizzat-gorustum’}
{relation id:1333017 slug:’chp-genclik-kollarindan-skandal-ayaklanma-cagrisi-ayasofya-camiini-diline-doladi’}
{relation id:1330469 slug:’hacliya-dost-muslumana-dusmanlar-ayasofya-camiinin-acilmasi-fetoculeri-kudurttu’}
{relation id:1328824 slug:’erdoganin-sozleri-israili-salladi-mescid-i-aksayi-ozgurlestirecek’}
entry.summary: Milli Görüş’ün merhum lideri Prof. Dr. Necmettin Erbakan’ın Ayasofya Camii’nin açılışının önemini anlatan bir konuşması yeniden gündeme geldi. Erbakan Hoca yaptığı konuşmada, "Eğer Ayasofya’da gümbür gümbür Ezanlar okunuyor, Hakk’ın sesi bütün dünyaya ilan ediliyorsa, o zaman da biliniz ki; Türkiye’de Milli Görüşçüler hakimdir, inananlar hakimdir" ifadeleri dikkat çekti. İşte Erbakan’ın o konuşması: "Eğer Ayasofya kırmızıya boyanmışsa… Kiliseye benzetilmişse… Ezan okunmuyor, içinde namaz kılınmıyorsa… Biliniz ki; Türkiye’yi taklitçiler hakimdir! Biliniz ki; yeryüzünde sadece zulüm düzeni yürümektedir. Yok, eğer Ayasofya’da gümbür gümbür Ezanlar okunuyor, Hakk’ın sesi bütün dünyaya ilan ediliyorsa, o zaman da biliniz ki; Türkiye’de Milli Görüşçüler hakimdir, inananlar hakimdir, yeryüzünde adil düzen saadet nizamı hakimdir!" {relation id:1341955 slug:’ihsan-senocak-acikladi-hz-ebu-eyyub-el-ensarinin-ayasofya-kerameti-bugun-ortaya-cikti’} {relation id:1341767 slug:’ayasofya-camiindeki-cuma-namazi-uzaydan-goruntulendi’} {relation id:1335160 slug:’erdogan-ve-erbakandan-surpriz-gorusme-cumhurbaskanimiz-ile-bizzat-gorustum’} {relation id:1333017 slug:’chp-genclik-kollarindan-skandal-ayaklanma-cagrisi-ayasofya-camiini-diline-doladi’} {relation id:1330469 slug:’hacliya-dost-muslumana-dusmanlar-ayasofya-camiinin-acilmasi-fetoculeri-kudurttu’} {relation id:1328824 slug:’erdoganin-sozleri-israili-salladi-mescid-i-aksayi-ozgurlestirecek’}

entry.title: 2 Minutes with Coco Vandeweghe

link.title: 2 Minutes with Coco Vandeweghe

entry.content: San Diego Aviators star Coco Vandeweghe opens up about her competitiveness, dealing with injuries and how she learned to be a tennis player.
entry.summary: San Diego Aviators star Coco Vandeweghe opens up about her competitiveness, dealing with injuries and how she learned to be a tennis player.

entry.title: Incendie de la cathédrale de Nantes: pour ce paroissien, le bénévole ‘a voulu crier sa douleur’

link.title: Incendie de la cathédrale de Nantes: pour ce paroissien, le bénévole ‘a voulu crier sa douleur’

entry.content: Une semaine après l’incendie dans la cathédrale de Nantes, un bénévole du diocèse est passé aux aveux et a été placé en détention provisoire dans la nuit de samedi à dimanche pour "destructions et dégradations par incendie". Cet homme, ressortissant rwandais, faisait "l’objet d’une obligation de quitter le territoire national délivrée en novembre 2019", a indiqué le procureur. Le mis en cause ne s’était "pas étendu en détails sur ses motivations" et qu’une "expertise psychiatrique sera ordonnée".
entry.summary: Une semaine après l’incendie dans la cathédrale de Nantes, un bénévole du diocèse est passé aux aveux et a été placé en détention provisoire dans la nuit de samedi à dimanche pour "destructions et dégradations par incendie". Cet homme, ressortissant rwandais, faisait "l’objet d’une obligation de quitter le territoire national délivrée en novembre 2019", a indiqué le procureur. Le mis en cause ne s’était "pas étendu en détails sur ses motivations" et qu’une "expertise psychiatrique sera ordonnée".
